LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS MARIA TANJUTCO-SMITH AND ROBERT GARABEDIAN'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD JUDGMENT DEBTORS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT SUFFICIENT FACTS FOR THE COURT TO CONCLUDE THAT INC. IS THE ALTER EGO OF DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS MARIA TANJUTCO-SMITH AND ROBERT GARABEDIAN'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT FUNDS ARE COMMINGLED OR THAT CORPORATE FORMALITIES ARE NOT FOLLOWED OR THAT THE CORPORATION IS A MERE SHELL. BECAUSE NEITHER PARTY HAS SUBMITTED THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE DEBTOR'S EXAMINATION, THE COURT IS LEFT WITH THE DECLARATIONS OF THE PARTIES. BASED ON THIS RECORD, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Judgment To Add Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS MARIA TANJUTCO-SMITH AND ROBERT GARABEDIAN'S Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Judgment Debtor.
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's MOTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT FUNDS ARE COMMINGLED OR THAT CORPORATE FORMALITIES ARE NOT FOLLOWED OR THAT THE CORPORATION IS A MERE SHELL. BECAUSE NEITHER PARTY HAS SUBMITTED THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE DEBTOR'S EXAMINATION, THE COURT IS LEFT WITH THE DECLARATIONS OF THE PARTIES. BASED ON THIS RECORD, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 =(302/PJM/JW)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Discharged

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Judgment To Add Judgment Debtors'
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Corey of Corey & Corey (777.5266) for plaintiffs and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS MARIA TANJUTCO-SMITH AND ROBERT GARABEDIAN'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD JUDGMENT DEBTORS is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff has failed to present sufficient facts for the Court to conclude that Inc. is the alter ego of defendant. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Linda Forster CSR #13286

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joseph P. Corey, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Maria Tanjutco-Smith
Irene Kho, judgment debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. The claim of exemption is denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
